calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Off Calendar

Notice Fo Motion And Motion For Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: A. Mok. Proceedings reported by: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
Order Granting Waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant DIETER ABT AKA DIETER P. ABT,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $69,030.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,557.28
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $646.88
Total Judgment in the amount of $85,234.16

Judgment signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-08-2017 Continued To Apr-25-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jan-12-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
